title: Petface (Little Petface) Rubber Ring Teething Chew Dog Toy, Perfect for Puppies and Small Dogs (Pack of 1)
features: PERFECT FOR PUPPIES: A Little Petface teething chew toy designed for small dogs and puppies to soothe teething discomfort
HIGH QUALITY: Made of soft yet sturdy, non-toxic rubber to withstand chewing, gnawing and fetching
DENTAL HEALTH: Featuring pimples that massage gums and help clean teeth for good canine dental hygiene
FUN PLAYTIME: Add treat paste in the ring or enjoy bouncy play sessions with this durable rubber toy

TOY SAFETY: This toy is strong but not indestructible, and will eventually become susceptible to ‘chew’ damage, please supervise your pet with this toy, examine regularly for wear, and replace if any damage could be seen a health hazard
description: Product Description The Little Petface Teething Chew Rubber Ring Dog Toy. The soft yet sturdy rubber construction is perfect for puppies and small dogs, providing a smooth texture with dental pimples for chewing, carrying, and fetching. Made from high-quality, non-toxic rubber the dental pimples combined with the smooth surface can help to soothe teething discomfort in puppies. Try adding your dog's favourite treat paste or pet safe peanut butter for an extra treat. It has an unpredictable bounce that adds an extra element of excitement to fetch games, keeping your dog entertained and engaged. Directions Not suitable for large dogs or strong chewers. It is the owners responsibility to decide if this product is suitable for their pet. Pets should be supervised when playing with toys. This toy is strong but not indestructible and will eventually become susceptible to chew damage. Examine regularly for wear and replace if any damage could represent a health hazard.
